description_long: This coupe car features a compact, sporty body with a sloping roofline and two doors, characteristic of classic 1980s Japanese coupes. The exterior is primarily a light gray color with black accents along the lower body, bumpers, and window trim. The front end displays pop-up headlights, a low-profile hood, and a subtle front lip, while the rear is defined by a hatchback design, integrated spoiler, and rectangular taillights. The side profile reveals black alloy wheels, pronounced wheel arches, and a distinctive black side molding running the length of the car. The windows are tinted, and the car has a streamlined, aerodynamic silhouette. The overall design suggests a lightweight, agile vehicle intended for urban and spirited driving.
description: A compact, light gray coupe car with black accents, pop-up headlights, and a sporty, sloped roofline. It features two doors, black alloy wheels, and a hatchback rear with a subtle spoiler.
description_view_0: Front view showing pop-up headlights, low hood, and black front bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting two doors, black side molding, and alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying hatchback design, integrated spoiler, and rectangular taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coupe's streamlined profile and black trim.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
